item.title: Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -R...
item.description:
Shakshuka 🍅🍳 One of my all time favorites Ingredients -Red bell pepper -Onion -Tomatoes (I used a mix of fresh and fire roasted canned tomatoes) -Garlic -Paprika -Coriander -Cumin seeds / ground cumin -Chili powder -Oregano -Salt -Eggs Toppings -Parsley -Mint -Yogurt Serve with some crusty bread or pita!
#cooking #shakshuka #recipe #breakfast
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mam...
item.description:
Parmigiana di melanzane🍆🍅 Straight from the garden for Mami Ingredients -Eggplant -Fresh tomatoes, Passata, Pomodorini… depends on preference and availability (: -Mozzarella -Parmigiano Reggiano DOP -Basil -Salt -Black Pepper -Flour -Frying Oil -Extra Virgin Olive Oil
#cooking #recipe #italy #eggplant #parmigiano #travel
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: SPAGHETTI ALL’ASSASSINA INGREDIENTS For the pasta: -Extra vir...
item.description:
SPAGHETTI ALL’ASSASSINA INGREDIENTS For the pasta: -Extra virgin olive oil -Garlic -Peperoncino or red chili flakes -Passata -Spaghetti For the tomato cooking liquid: -Water -Salt -Tomato paste -Parsley and basil (optional)
#spaghetti #allassassina
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: French Dip Sandwichh 🥖🥩 Ingredients For the beef: -Chuck...
item.description:
French Dip Sandwichh 🥖🥩 Ingredients For the beef: -Chuck roast or top round -Beef tallow (to sear) -Onion -Garlic -Beef stock *(homemade ingredients below) -Worcestershire sauce -Bay leaf -Fresh thyme -Fresh rosemary -Black pepper -Salt For the caramelized onions: -Yellow onions -Unsalted butter -Olive oil -Salt -Few cracks of black pepper For the horseradish aioli: -Mayonnaise -Fresh horseradish root -Dijon mustard -Lemon (juice) -Garlic -Salt -Black pepper For assembly: -Cooked beef -Hot au jus -Caramelized onions -Horseradish aioli -Provolone or Gruyère cheese -Flat-leaf parsley -Bread such as French rolls, Hoagie rolls, or Baguette -Butter *For the homemade stock : -Beef bones (marrow bones and/or knuckle bones) -Onion -Carrot -Celery -Tomato paste -Bay leaves -Black peppercorns -Fresh thyme -Flat-leaf parsley stems -Water
#frenchdip #sandwich
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: LOBSTER RISOTTO 🦞 For the lobster: Lobster tails Lobster mea...
item.description:
LOBSTER RISOTTO 🦞 For the lobster: Lobster tails Lobster meat Lobster shells Unsalted butter Olive oil Garlic Lemon Chives Black pepper For the Lobster Stock: Lobster shells Olive oil Tomato paste Onion Carrot Celery Garlic Dry white wine Bay leaf Black peppercorns Fresh thyme (I forgot this but it’s great) Lemon peel Water For the Risotto: Carnaroli or arborio rice Shallot Butter Extra Virgin Olive oil Dry white wine Lobster stock Saffron Parmigiano-Reggiano Pecorino Romano Black pepper Sea salt To Finish: Chives Lemon zest Extra virgin olive oil Flaky sea salt
#risotto #lobster
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: STEAK AU POIVRE SANDWICH 🥩 INGREDIENTS For the steak: -Ribe...
item.description:
STEAK AU POIVRE SANDWICH 🥩 INGREDIENTS For the steak: -Ribeye or NY Strip -Salt -Black peppercorns -Garlic -Rosemary -Butter (to baste) -Beef tallow or avocado oil (to sear) For the sauce: -Shallot -Cognac -Butter -Green peppercorns in brine -Beef stock -Heavy cream -Dijon mustard For the fries -Russet potatoes -Salt -High-temp frying oil For the onions -Yellow onions -Extra virgin olive oil -Butter -Salt -Fresh thyme -Cognac
#steakaupoivre #sandwich
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: CEVICHE 🇨🇷 INGREDIENTS -Fresh shrimp -Fresh seabass -Fre...
item.description:
CEVICHE 🇨🇷 INGREDIENTS -Fresh shrimp -Fresh seabass -Fresh lime juice -White or red onion -Cilantro -Bell pepper -Hot pepper (such as ají chombo, jalapeño, or serrano) -Salt -Black pepper For the patacones -Green plantains -High temp frying oil -Salt
#ceviche #costarica
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: GNOCCHI AL RAGÙ 🥔 INGREDIENTS For the gnocchi: -Yukon gold ...
item.description:
GNOCCHI AL RAGÙ 🥔 INGREDIENTS For the gnocchi: -Yukon gold or russet potatoes -00’ or All-purpose flour -Egg -Salt For the Bolognese: -Yellow onion -Carrot -Celery -Pancetta (optional) -Ground beef -Dry red wine (can also use white wine) -Tomato Paste -Tomato passata or crushed tomatoes -Bay leaf -Salt -Black pepper -Parmigiano rind (to simmer, then removed) To finish -Parmigiano-Reggiano
#gnocchi #bolognese
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: Saving time this new year and cooking fresh and delicious home c...
item.description:
Saving time this new year and cooking fresh and delicious home cooked meals with . A quick lunch featuring Bavette Steak, Crispy Roasted Potatoes, and a Mixed Greens Salad!
@HelloFresh US #HelloFreshPartner #HelloFresh

item.title: I was feeling really confident until..😭 I’ve never been gre...
item.description:
I was feeling really confident until..😭 I’ve never been great with physical forms of art but I’ve really enjoyed and connected to ceramics and the process is rewarding. And humbling
#ceramics #clay
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: DETROIT STYLE PIZZA 🍕 INGREDIENTS For the dough: -310g Bread...
item.description:
DETROIT STYLE PIZZA 🍕 INGREDIENTS For the dough: -310g Bread Flour -10g Salt -10g Fresh Yeast -220g Warm water -Olive Oil For the sauce: -1 can of San Marzano tomatoes -Tomato paste -1 garlic clove -1 Tbsp olive oil -Pinch of Salt -Dried oregano -Fresh or dry basil -Calabrian chili or red pepper flakes (optional for some heat) You can also make a raw sauce with just tomatoes, salt, black pepper, olive oil, For the toppings: -Wisconsin brick cheese and/or low-moisture mozzarella -Provolone, Fontina, or Scamorza -Spicy or mild Italian sausage -Cup and Char pepperoni -Hot Honey -Fresh Basil
#detroitpizza #cooking
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED

item.title: MANTI Ingredients For the dough: -AP Flour -Egg -Water -Salt ...
item.description:
MANTI Ingredients For the dough: -AP Flour -Egg -Water -Salt For the filling: -Ground lamb and/or beef -Onion -Parsley -Garlic -Ground cumin -Aleppo pepper flakes -Red pepper paste -Paprika -Salt -Black pepper For the Yogurt Sauce: -Plain full fat yogurt -Garlic clove -Salt -Fresh Dill -Mint Salt For the Butter finishing sauce: -Butter -Aleppo pepper and/or Calabrian chili paste -Sweet paprika -Tomato paste -Turkish pepper paste (biber salçası) -Fresh Thyme To finish: Sumac Dried mint (I forgot and put fresh mint but dried is more traditional)
#manti #turkishfood
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
